title: Tool Planning (Fresh Turn)
description: Building and executing a ToolExecutionPlan for tool calls returned by the model on a fresh (non-resumed) turn. Covers MCP approval routing, parallel tool dispatch, result aggregation, and interruption surfacing.
interaction_flow: Caller → execute_tools_and_side_effects: ProcessedResponse, bindings, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config

_build_plan_for_fresh_turn → return ToolExecutionPlan(function_runs, computer_actions, custom_tool_calls, shell_calls, apply_patch_calls, local_shell_calls, pending_interruptions, approved_mcp_responses, mcp_requests_with_callback)

execute_tools_and_side_effects → _execute_tool_plan(plan, bindings, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config): (function_results, input_guardrail_results, output_guardrail_results, computer_results, custom_tool_results, shell_results, apply_patch_results, local_shell_results)
_execute_tool_plan → execute_function_tool_calls(bindings, plan.function_runs, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config, isolate_parallel_failures): (results, input_guardrails, output_guardrails)
execute_tools_and_side_effects → _build_tool_result_items(function_results, computer_results, custom_tool_results, shell_results, apply_patch_results, local_shell_results): ordered RunItem[]
execute_tools_and_side_effects → _append_mcp_callback_results(agent, plan.mcp_requests_with_callback, context_wrapper, append_item=new_step_items.append) [only if no interruptions]

key_data_structures.ProcessedResponse: functions[], computer_actions[], custom_tool_calls[], shell_calls[], apply_patch_calls[], local_shell_calls[], mcp_approval_requests[], handoffs[], new_items[]
key_data_structures.ToolExecutionPlan: function_runs[], computer_actions[], custom_tool_calls[], shell_calls[], apply_patch_calls[], local_shell_calls[], pending_interruptions[], approved_mcp_responses[], mcp_requests_with_callback[]; has_interruptions property
key_data_structures.ToolApprovalItem: agent, raw_item, tool_name, tool_namespace, tool_origin, tool_lookup_key
key_data_structures.SingleStepResult: original_input, model_response, pre_step_items, new_step_items, next_step (NextStepInterruption|NextStepHandoff|NextStepFinalOutput|NextStepRunAgain), tool_input_guardrail_results, tool_output_guardrail_results

key_relationships: _collect_mcp_approval_plan delegates manual MCP approval to _apply_manual_mcp_approvals → collect_manual_mcp_approvals (tool_execution.py)
_execute_tool_plan calls all 6 executor functions from tool_execution.py (parallel or sequential)
_collect_runs_by_approval is used for shell/apply_patch/custom calls in resolve_interrupted_turn (resume path, NOT fresh turn path)
Fresh turn: all function_runs, shell_calls, etc. are included in plan directly; approval-check for shell/apply_patch happens inside execute_shell_calls/execute_apply_patch_calls
MCP split: requests with on_approval_request callback → execute async via _append_mcp_callback_results; requests without → manual interruption flow

flow_branching.parallel_execution: When parallel=True (default), _execute_tool_plan uses asyncio.gather() over all 6 executor calls simultaneously
flow_branching.mcp_approval_partition: HostedMCP requests split: with on_approval_request callback → deferred to after interruption check; manual (no callback) → checked immediately via context_wrapper.get_approval_status()
flow_branching.approval_status: True=approved (run), False=rejected (build rejection item), None=pending (create ToolApprovalItem interruption)
flow_branching.interruption_short_circuit: If any interruptions exist after plan execution, return SingleStepResult(NextStepInterruption) immediately, skipping handoffs and final output
flow_branching.isolate_parallel_failures: function_tool failures are isolated when multiple function runs OR parallel with other tool types

important_notes: Fresh turn vs resume turn: _build_plan_for_fresh_turn takes ALL tool runs from ProcessedResponse directly (no per-run approval check except MCP). Resume turn (_build_plan_for_resume_turn) receives pre-filtered runs. _collect_runs_by_approval is a helper used in the resume path (resolve_interrupted_turn) for shell/apply_patch/custom tools, not in fresh turn. ToolApprovalItem items are added to both pending_interruptions[] AND new_step_items[] so they appear in run result. _collect_tool_interruptions also captures nested Agent.as_tool() interruptions via result.agent_run_result.interruptions.
